name: overleaf-github-workflow-agent
description: A local Codex workflow agent for checking and guiding the Positron/VS Code, AI, Overleaf, Git, GitHub, and LaTeX setup.

interface.shortDescription: Audit and guide the local Overleaf-GitHub course workflow.
interface.longDescription: Provides a conservative Codex skill and read-only PowerShell audit script for checking Git remotes, LaTeX tooling, ignore rules, editor settings, and manual setup steps.
defaultPrompt: Audit this repo for the Overleaf-GitHub workflow.
Guide me through connecting Overleaf and GitHub.
Check whether my LaTeX/Git setup is ready.
